user_question: Can this verified agent result be accepted?
llm_output: The agent result is low risk based on the evidence. The tool output was verified against the final observation, so it can be accepted with notes.

evidence.text: The lookup tool completed successfully and returned the expected record.
The final observation matches the verified tool output.

policy_rules.text: Verified low-risk agent results can be accepted when grounded in evidence.
Tool outputs should be verified against final observations.
